landing.lede: We're building the place where Italy's crypto community meets, learns and grows. Drop your email and we'll let you know when we open the doors.
landing.emailInvalid: Hmm, check your email and try again.

cookieBanner.title: We respect your privacy
cookieBanner.description: We use essential cookies and, with your consent, preferences, analytics and marketing cookies to improve the site.

cookieModal.title: Cookie preferences
cookieModal.intro: Choose which cookie categories to enable. You can change your mind at any time.

necessary.label: Essential
necessary.description: Required for the site to work (session, security, basic preferences). Always on: without these you couldn't browse.

preferences.label: Preferences
preferences.description: Remember your choices (language, theme, layout) to personalize the experience on future visits.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how the site is used (most-viewed pages, errors). Data is aggregated and helps us improve.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Allow us to show more relevant content and ads on this site or on third-party platforms.

mfaPolicyBanner.warningBody: Your administrator has made MFA mandatory. Set it up within {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} (by {deadline}) to keep using your account without interruption.
mfaPolicyBanner.blockingTitle: Set up two-factor authentication to continue
mfaPolicyBanner.blockingBody: MFA is required on your account. Configure it below to regain access to the rest of the app.
mfaPolicyBanner.blockingForcedBody: We brought you here because MFA is mandatory and the grace period has expired. Configure it below to regain access.
